notAllowed.title: Authentication cancelled
notAllowed.message: The passkey prompt was closed or timed out before the operation completed.

userOperationExecution.title: Transaction failed
userOperationExecution.message: An error occurred while executing the transaction. Please try again.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.message: An error occurred. Please try again.

alreadyRegistered.title: Already have a passkey
alreadyRegistered.message: This device already has a passkey for your account. Try logging in instead.

noCredential.title: No passkey found
noCredential.message: No passkey was found on this device. Create one, or sign in on the device where you registered.

noScreenLock.title: Screen lock required
noScreenLock.message: Your device needs a screen lock (PIN, pattern, or biometrics) to use passkeys. Add one in your settings, then try again.

unsupported.title: Passkeys unavailable
unsupported.message: Passkeys can't be used on this device right now. Make sure your passkey provider is set up, or try another device.

syncFailed.title: Passkey sync issue
syncFailed.message: Your phone couldn't complete the passkey step. This is usually a Google Password Manager sync issue on this device — not a problem with your account.
syncFailed.step1: Open your phone Settings, make sure Google Password Manager is the active passkey provider and that passkey sync is turned on.
syncFailed.step2: Update Google Play Services, then restart your phone and try again.
syncFailed.step3: Still stuck? Sign in on another device, or recover your wallet from the settings.

inAppBrowser.title: Open in your browser
inAppBrowser.description: For a better experience, open this page in your default browser.
inAppBrowser.warning: You're using an embedded browser. Your experience may be degraded. Tap to open in your browser.
inAppBrowser.clickToOpen: Tap to open in your browser.
inAppBrowser.clipboardAlert:
This browser doesn't support all features needed.

The link has been copied to your clipboard.

To continue:
1. Open Safari
2. Tap the address bar
3. Paste and go
inAppBrowser.clipboardManualAlert:
This browser doesn't support all features needed.

Automatic copy failed.

Copy this link manually:
{{url}}

Then:
1. Open Safari
2. Tap the address bar
3. Paste and go

pairing.title: Confirm device pairing
pairing.text: You're about to connect a device to your account.
pairing.code: Check that the code is correct
pairing.scanDescription: Scan this QR code to sign in from your mobile.
pairing.noCodeNotice: Confirm this pairing request to continue.

error.title: Invalid pairing request
error.notFound: Pairing request not found or expired

switchPasskey.title: Different passkey required
switchPasskey.description: This pairing was started with another passkey from your wallet. Switch to it on this device to continue.

state.retryError: Error when connecting to the paired device

requests.connecting: Open your paired device to proceed to the transaction
requests.paired: Wait for partner to process signature

error.title: Couldn’t connect
error.description: Something interrupted the pairing. Please try again.

signatureRequest.title: Signature request
signatureRequest.description: A device <strongFrom>{{from}}</strongFrom> is requesting your signature

banner.title: Another device is waiting for your signature

toastLoading.stuck:
Stuck? See the Troubleshooting section for more information.

You can try to .
(this will logout and you will need to redo a login / pairing)

mobile-tx.explanation: Approve this transaction in your wallet app
mobile-tx.appNotFoundHint: Please reinstall the app or try again
